title: POLAND enforcement action against Housing Associaction (2,350)
summary: Insufficient fulfilment of data breach notification obligations The Polish DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 2,350 on a housing association. The controller suffered a data breach and failed to inform the DPA within 72 hours Legal basis: Art. 33 (1) GDPR.
dedupKey: poland enforcement action against housing associaction 2 350|2026-04-07
